binade_quantum_convention: u_q = 2^(floor(log2|x|) - q + 1) - x's OWN binade (authority section 1; straddle-safe, NO special-casing anywhere)
determinism: batteries are literals; zero RNG at runtime; byte-stable re-run required before commit; FAIL stops the stage for Will.

grading_formulas_derived_and_cited.A-P2_grading: quarter-kind (built at q0=53, x = s +- u/4 with s mid-binade on the 53-bit grid): assert s_54 == s_53 (ancestor) AND e_54 == e_53. half-kind (x = s +- u/2): assert e_54 == 0 exactly (s_54 == x). Cited: authority section 1 tie anatomy + section 2 corollary 2.
grading_formulas_derived_and_cited.A-P3_grading: for each dyadic case (odd significand of exact bit-length L, times 2^j): for every q in sweep: (s_q == x) <=> (q >= L). Cited: authority section 2 corollary 3 + the representability of an L-bit odd significand at precision q iff q >= L.
grading_formulas_derived_and_cited.D_from_RNE: D = RNE(2t_q) evaluated by exact comparison (authority section 1 case anatomy): D = 0 iff |e_q| < u_q/4 OR |e_q| == u_q/4 (tie 2t=+-1/2 -> even = 0); D = sign(e_q) iff |e_q| > u_q/4 (incl. |e_q| == u_q/2 where 2t = +-1 is integer). Derived from RNE on {-1,0,+1} grid; cited: authority section 1.
grading_formulas_derived_and_cited.independent_rounding: s_q = RN_q(x) computed DIRECTLY by the reference rounder at each q (round-to-nearest-ties-even to q bits at x's own binade, unbounded exponent). The Law must PREDICT the independently-computed s_{q+1}.
grading_formulas_derived_and_cited.law_in_s_form: e_{q+1} = e_q - (u_q/2)*D <=> s_{q+1} = s_q + (u_q/2)*D, since e_q = x - s_q with x FIXED (subtract the two definitions). Graded in the s-form because s-values are dyadic rationals exactly representable for ALL phenomenon classes including sqrt (whose e is irrational but whose s-increments are in Q). Cited: authority section 1 definitions.
grading_formulas_derived_and_cited.sqrt_exact_comparisons: for x = sqrt(R), R rational positive non-square: floor(x/u) via isqrt(P*Q)//Q on x/u = sqrt(P/Q); all comparisons x vs rational c (c>0) decided by R vs c^2 in Q. No floating point in any decision.

instrument_class: REFEREE-CLASS (brief fence 4): exact-Q rounder + Law stepper, pure stdlib fractions, flow RECORDS not TypedResults - no Amendment-1 membrane, no eval-registry entry
object: the Free Law at campaign grade (Refinement Law certification)
performance_budget: 120 s wall per full grading run, declared from the Phase-0 measurement (213,988 Q-steps/s on this host; projected ~2 s). Shrinkage protocol inherited: recorded reasons, never silent.

predictions_verbatim_from_brief.A-P1: zero violations of e_{q+1} = e_q - (u_q/2)*RNE(2t_q) across the entire pinned battery, every op class, every step, exact in Q - straddle and tie cases included under the x-binade-quantum convention with NO special-casing.
predictions_verbatim_from_brief.A-P2: on the constructed tie battery, |t|=1/4 cases resolve to the ancestor (e unchanged) and |t|=1/2 cases annihilate (e_{q+1} = 0 exactly), 100%, no exceptions.
predictions_verbatim_from_brief.A-P3: for every dyadic battery case with bit-length L: e_q = 0 <=> q >= L. Both directions graded (the <= catches premature death; the => catches immortal dyadics - either would be an instrument defect).

q_sweep: q = 53..80 inclusive (27 refinement steps per case)
rows_served: Obs 2/R6 (foundation stage), B3, separator M3 grounding
